_comment: Sister to cube_corner2_seg6_rebevel_polyline.json but with seg=3 in 1st bevel and seg=2 in 2nd. Mirrors test_bevel_capseg_rebevel_seg2.d. Post-Phase-5: topology matches Blender bit-for-bit (27V/20F, arity {4:16, 7:2, 6:2}). Remaining XFAIL is geometric drift only (~0.005-0.012 worst position diff), same residual as cube_corner2_seg6_rebevel_polyline — a non-topological bevel-position issue.
